description: The ecommerce platform is experiencing a critical production outage. Four microservices in the 'ecommerce' namespace are failing, causing complete service unavailability. Diagnose and restore all services in the 'ecommerce' namespace to a healthy running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost (cluster: 'local') with credentials admin / Admin12345678!.

injected_failures: api-gateway uses a non-existent Docker image tag causing ImagePullBackOff
web-frontend Service selector does not match pod labels causing zero endpoints
cache-layer ConfigMap has wrong Redis port (6380 instead of 6379)
batch-processor has excessive memory request (32Gi) causing Pending state
